words.def: put to the test, as for its quality, or give experimental use to
words.zh: a. 經過試驗的, 經受過考驗的, 經驗定的, 檢驗無病的
n. 種子, 籽, 萌芽, 子孫, 精液

words.def: trying something to find out about it
words.zh: n. 測試, 試驗, 化驗, 檢驗, 考驗, 甲殼

words.def: a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used
words.zh: n. 日落, 同夥, 組合, 集合, 裝置

words.def: the seat within a bishop's diocese where his cathedral is located
words.zh: vt. 看見, 檢視, 參觀, 遊覽, 理解, 知道, 同意
